summary: Critical gaps: (1) No test fixtures provided, yet run_fixture_tests.py requires test_fixtures/*.json; (2) TDD requirement violated—no evidence of failing test→minimal code→refactor; (3) Workflow missing actionlint validation step (required); (4) No act-result.txt generation or test harness driver (required to run via `act push`); (5) dry-run flag parsed but no deletion enforcement logic; (6) Policy application order (max_age→keep_latest_n→max_total_size) lacks justification and may produce unexpected results if policies conflict. Individual scripts (artifact_cleanup.py, run_fixture_tests.py) have good structure and error handling, but deliverable is incomplete against stated requirements.
